Account.Name: Advertising & Marketing
Account.Description: Ads, business cards, and other marketing costs

Account.Name: Ask My Accountant
Account.Description: Flagged to review with your accountant.

Account.Name: Bank Charges & Fees
Account.Description: Fees or charges from your bank or credit card

Account.Name: Car & Truck
Account.Description: Gas, repairs, insurance, and other costs for your business-only vehicle (not loan payments)

Account.Name: Online Payment
Account.Description: Authorize.net website

Account.Name: Insurance
Account.Description: Liability, fire, theft, and other insurance for your business (not health)

Account.Name: Interest Paid
Account.Description: Interest paid on loans, credit cards, and business vehicles

Account.Name: Legal & Professional Services
Account.Description: Professional services including legal, financial, accounting, and payroll

Account.Name: Meals & Entertainment
Account.Description: Client meals and entertainment and travel meals (business-related only)

Account.Name: Office Supplies & Software
Account.Description: Office, kitchen, and bathroom supplies, including software under $2,500

Account.Name: Other Business Expenses
Account.Description: Other expenses for your business, including training and conferences

Account.Name: Owner's Investment
Account.Description: Money you invested in your business

Account.Name: Owner's Pay & Personal Expenses
Account.Description: Money you took out of your business to pay yourself (not payroll expenses)

Account.Name: Contractors
Account.Description: Services provided by 1099 contractors, such as landscapers, electricians, and web designers

Account.Name: Reimbursable Expenses
Account.Description: Purchases you made for a customer that they will reimburse

Account.Name: Rent & Lease
Account.Description: Office space, storage, vehicle, machinery, and equipment rentals and leases (short or long-term)

Account.Name: Repairs & Maintenance
Account.Description: Repairs, maintenance, and cleaning for ofiice space and equipment

Account.Name: Supplies
Account.Description: Supplies you bought to complete a job (not products you sell to customers)

Account.Name: Taxes & Licenses
Account.Description: Property and business taxes, licenses, memberships, and permits (not sales tax)

Account.Name: Travel
Account.Description: Business travel including transportation, hotels, and tips (not meals)

Account.Name: Utilities
Account.Description: Phone, gas, electric, water, internet, and other utilities for your business
